recap.headline: UNH, Maine battle to 2-2 tie in preseason Buffalo Wild Wings Border Battle
recap.teaser: Simon Motew and Max Scott scored for Maine.

recap.headline: Poirier nets hat trick as Maine tops Holy Cross in season opener
recap.teaser: Justin Poirier recorded a hat trick in a 5-2 win.

recap.headline: Black Bears sweep weekend series with Crusaders
recap.teaser: Josh Nadeau had two points while Albin Boija had a 22-save shutout.

recap.headline: Black Bears, Bobcats battle to tie in non-conference action
recap.teaser: Four different Black Bears scored in the 4-4 tie.

recap.headline: Bobcats trip up Black Bears in non-conference action
recap.teaser: The Black Bears fell to the Bobcats in non-conference road action.

recap.headline: Maine drops exhibition game to UNH
recap.teaser: ORONO, Maine - The University of Maine women's ice hockey team started the 2025-26 season with an exhibition game against New Hampshire on Saturday at the Whittemore Center. Maine was defeated by a score of 5-1.

recap.headline: Maine battles with  #10 Quinnipiac in season opener
recap.teaser: HAMDEN, CT - The Maine Black Bears pushed the #10 Quinnipiac Bobcats right to the final minutes of their season-opener on Friday night at M&T Bank Arena, before the game ended in a 3-2 loss.

recap.headline: Maine pushes the nationally ranked #10 Quinnipiac Bobcats to OT, falls 4-3
recap.teaser: HAMDEN, Conn. - The University of Maine women's ice hockey team pushed the nationally ranked #10 Quinnipiac Bobcats to an overtime period on Saturday before the game ended in a 4-3 loss.

recap.headline: Maine shut out by #1 Wisconsin, 5-0
recap.teaser: MADISON, Wisconsin - The Maine Black Bears were blanked by the #1 Wisconsin Badgers on Friday night at LaBahn Arena by a score of 5-0.

recap.headline: Women's Ice Hockey blanked by the #1 Badgers
recap.teaser: MADISON, Wisconsin - The University of Maine women's ice hockey team fell to the #1 nationally ranked Wisconsin Badgers on Saturday, 5 to 0.

mbball.location: Charles E. Smith Center, Washington, DC

recap.headline: Men's Basketball Falls on Opening Night at George Washington
recap.teaser: The University of Maine basketball team was defeated by George Washington on opening night, 67-47.

mbball.location: Stony Brook Arena, Stony Brook, NY

recap.headline: Black Bears fall at Stony Brook on Saturday Evening
recap.teaser: The University of Maine basketball team fell in a tight battle against Stony Brook on Saturday evening, 71-60.

recap.headline: Maine falls at Rutgers on Monday Night
recap.teaser: The University of Maine basketball fell at BIG 10 opponent Rutgers on Monday night, 72-60.

recap.headline: Basketball Falls to Quinnipiac in Home Opener
recap.teaser: The University of Maine basketball team fell against Quinnipiac on Sunday evening, 70-64.

recap.headline: Smith tallies 25 points in her return, Black Bears fall by one to Saint Joseph's
recap.teaser: ORONO, Maine -- After missing the 2024-25 season due to injury, Adrianna Smith returned in a big way as she tallied her 40th career double-double in a 63-62 loss to Saint Joseph's in Maine's season opener on Friday evening.

recap.headline: Blauenfeldt leads Maine in loss at #9 NC State
recap.teaser: RALEIGH, N.C. -- The University of Maine women's basketball team held No. 9 NC State to its lowest point total of the season but it wasn't enough as the Black Bears dropped a 66-47 decision to the Wolfpack on Tuesday evening.

wbball.location: Stuart C. Siegel Center, Richmond, VA

recap.headline: Women's Basketball Falls in Close Contest at VCU on Friday Night
recap.teaser: The University of Maine women's basketball program fell in a close battle against VCU on Friday night, 81-77.

recap.headline: Black Bears cruise past Stonehill
recap.teaser: ORONO, Maine -- Adrianna Smith posted 26 points and 10 rebounds for her third double-double of the season as the University of Maine women's basketball team registered its first victory of the season, defeating Stonehill 79-53 on Monday evening.

recap.headline: Women's Basketball falls at Brown
recap.teaser: PROVIDENCE, R.I. -- Asta Blauenfeldt led Maine with 10 points in the University of Maine women's basketball team's 70-39 loss at Brown on Sunday afternoon.

recap.headline: Baseball Splits Friday Doubleheader at Duke
recap.teaser: The University of Maine baseball split a doubleheader with Duke on Friday evening, losing game one 8-3 before winning game two, 4-3.

recap.headline: Baseball Splits Friday Doubleheader at Duke
recap.teaser: The University of Maine baseball split a doubleheader with Duke on Friday evening, losing game one 8-3 before winning game two, 4-3.

recap.headline: Baseball Drops Final Two Games of Series at Duke on Saturday Afternoon
recap.teaser: The University of Maine baseball team dropped the final two games of the weekend series on Saturday afternoon at Duke.

recap.headline: Baseball Drops Final Two Games of Series at Duke on Saturday Afternoon
recap.teaser: The University of Maine baseball team dropped the final two games of the weekend series on Saturday afternoon at Duke.

recap.headline: Baseball Picks up Series Opening Win at High Point
recap.teaser: The University of Maine baseball team grabbed their second win of the season as they defeated High Point in the series opener, 7-5.

recap.headline: Maine falls in close contests to Evansville, NC A&T
recap.teaser: Maine opened up the 2026 season on Friday at the Heart of Georgia Classic.

recap.headline: Field Hockey falls to #8 Boston College, 2-0
recap.teaser: The University of Maine field hockey program was defeated by #8 Boston College on Friday afternoon 2-0.

recap.headline: Geniti registers two goals in loss to Indiana
recap.teaser: ORONO, Maine - The University of Maine field hockey team jumped out to a two goal lead on Indiana but was unable to hold on, falling to the Hoosiers by a final of 4-3 on Monday afternoon.

recap.headline: Kuefler scores in Overtime, Maine beats Quinnipiac 2-1
recap.teaser: ORONO, Maine - The University of Maine field hockey program captured an overtime victory against Quinnipiac University, 2-1 at the Maine Field Hockey Complex Friday afternoon.

recap.headline: Penty, Barratt lead Maine over Stonehill
recap.teaser: ORONO, Maine – Eloise Penty and Martha Barratt each registered a pair of goals as the Black Bears completed the weekend sweep with a 5-1 victory over Stonehill on Sunday afternoon.

recap.headline: Penty scores in Field Hockey's loss at Dartmouth
recap.teaser: HANOVER, N.H. - Eloise Penty tallied a goal for the second-straight game but it would not be enough as the University of Maine field hockey team dropped a 2-1 decision in overtime to Dartmouth on Friday afternoon.

recap.headline: Maine falls in season opener to Rhode Island
recap.teaser: The Rams scored twice in the second half.

recap.headline: Nicholson scores first career goal, Maine falls to BU
recap.teaser: Emma Nicholson scored her first career goal as Maine fell in non-conference action.

recap.headline: Black Bears earn road win at Merrimack
recap.teaser: Three Black Bears scored in the win.

recap.headline: Black Knights, Black Bears battle to 2-2 tie
recap.teaser: Emma Nicholson and Abbey Thornton scored for Maine.
